reviews.review_msg: canvas was a mess, multiple weeks worth of lectures were not posted until a week before the exam, exams locked on the date its due until late in the evening. it would take weeks to receive grades and feedback on the weekly assignments which makes improving difficult. but he is a very nice prof, his lectures are great and interesting.

Literally such a caring professor. There were some technical difficulties throughout the semester, but he never hesitated to address it and give generous extensions for the whole class. A great prof and an enjoyable, easier-going class.
What a great guy, so caring and genuine.
insane gem of a prof, so caring towards his students and so easy to talk to about grades and assignments
Dr adel is quite a great professor, really easy marking and little to no readings. More focused on class engagment
by far the best prof i have had a sfu :)) easy grader, however downside is you don't know where you are in the semester till finals are over.

I took CMNS 235 with Dr Adel, and I can truly say he's the best prof I have taken at SFU. He goes the extra mile to care for his students and his lectures are easy and straightforward. Any class with him his a GPA booster as long as your present and willing to learn.

took CMNS 235 during fall and by far the best prof i have genuinely ever had. he goes the extra mile to ensure students are on track and makes his lectures super engaging and easy to follow. i genuinely cannot thank him enough for his grading system and how amazing he is.
Dr Adel is such a caring prof, wants everyone to succeed and loves engaging in conversations with students. He connects the material to current world day issues which makes it much more engaging.
no midterm, easy assignments and in class short essay for the final! super chill guy would highly reccomend him :))

amazing amazing professor! he makes complicated topics feel easy to understand makes the class feel extremely comfortable! he has good energy everywhere he goes, highly recommend any class taken with him!
amazing prof, super engaging lecture and such a hilarious guy. it is obvious that he is passionate about what he teaches and ensures every student has a version of understanding their work
hilarious dude, genuinely one of the best classes and not a harsh marker at all. super understanding if you are in need of anything at all, you won't regret taking his class!
Such a chill and supportive prof. He really focuses on us being engaged and actually learning. Super down to earth guy who wants everyone to do well.
One of the most caring professors I've had at SFU. He really wants everyone to do well and actually learn. Highly recommend his classes.

Dr. Adel is amazing. He truly cares about his students and genuinely wants every single one of us to succeed. He's patient, helpful, and always willing to take extra time to explain things. His lectures are engaging, clear, and easy to follow. One of the best profs at SFU. Plus he's hilarious!

This professor is genuinely one of the best. He shows up with apples for the class, checks in on how everyone is doing, and honestly feels more like a cool uncle than a prof. He's understanding, patient, and  reminds us that everyone learns differently and that we're all capable of doing well. Best class ever! Do take it with him :)

He's the best, although he didnt reply emails frequently. His class is funny and interesting. Adel is definitely a decent profession with abundant knowledge and sense of humour. I'd love to take his course again.
Generouse prof, fun lectures, interesting course contents, I just loved taking the course. Excellent prof!! :D

Definitely one of the best profs I have had in the Cmns department.  Learned a lot and actually enjoyed going to class because he marks fairly easy and that made it easier to just come and engage with the material instead of worrying about grades ie. actually learned.
